seoTitle: Newstead vs Newton Boyd — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Newstead and Newton Boyd. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Newstead vs Newton Boyd: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Newstead and Newton Boyd.
heading: Newstead vs Newton Boyd — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Newstead, New South Wales and Newton Boyd, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newstead has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Newton Boyd (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Newstead or Newton Boyd safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Newstead has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Newton Boyd scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Newstead scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Newton Boyd scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Newstead or Newton Boyd?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newstead has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
